name: Fallout: New Vegas Quest Book
description: Quest pre-dialogue and prompt-safe quest event metadata for Fallout: New Vegas. The model sees natural quest context and abstract quest events, never raw game commands.

0.comment: Sunny Smiles can offer Back in the Saddle
0.content: Sunny Smiles can naturally offer the Courier practical survival training after Doc Mitchell sends them into Goodsprings. This starts with firearms practice behind the Prospector Saloon, then can continue into helping Sunny and Cheyenne clear geckos from the Goodsprings source.
0.offerSummary: Offer the player hands-on help learning to survive in the Mojave: first shoot empty Sunset Sarsaparilla bottles behind the Prospector Saloon, then ask if they want to come along and clear geckos from the Goodsprings source.
0.preDialogue: Sunny should sound like a friendly, capable Goodsprings hunter and survival teacher. Keep it practical and local: she can say Doc Mitchell mentioned the Courier might need help, offer to show them the basics, and make the training feel like a favor from someone who knows the town rather than a detached tutorial.
objectives: Talk to Sunny Smiles in the Prospector Saloon.
Meet Sunny Smiles behind the Prospector Saloon.
Shoot 3 sarsaparilla bottles outside the Prospector Saloon.
Kill the geckos at the well.
Kill the geckos at the other wells.
Talk to Sunny about your reward.

stageHints.label: Talk to Sunny Smiles in the Prospector Saloon.
Meet Sunny Smiles behind the Prospector Saloon.
Shoot 3 sarsaparilla bottles outside the Prospector Saloon.
Kill the geckos at the well.
Kill the geckos at the other wells.
Talk to Sunny about your reward.

questEvents.label: Offer Back in the Saddle
questEvents.description: Use when Sunny explains the training opportunity without the player accepting yet.

questEvents.label: Player accepts Back in the Saddle
questEvents.description: Use only after the player clearly agrees to Sunny's training.

execution.script:
float fIssued

Begin Function {}
    let fIssued := 0
    StartQuest VCG02
    SetStage VCG02 4
    let fIssued := 1
    SetFunctionValue fIssued
End

questEvents.label: Player declines or delays Back in the Saddle
questEvents.description: Use when the player clearly refuses or says to do it later.

questEvents.label: Player asks to end the tutorial path
questEvents.description: Use only when the player explicitly asks to end or skip the tutorial.

0.vectorizableText:
Quest: Back in the Saddle
Editor ID: VCG02
Form ID: 0010A214
Given by: Sunny Smiles
Location: Goodsprings, Prospector Saloon, Goodsprings source
Quest type: tutorial
Topics: survival training, firearms, empty Sunset Sarsaparilla bottles, geckos, Cheyenne, Doc Mitchell, Mojave Wasteland
Walkthrough: talk to Sunny Smiles, meet behind the Prospector Saloon, shoot 3 sarsaparilla bottles, follow Sunny, kill geckos at the well, talk to Sunny, clear the other wells, talk about the reward
Dialogue: Sunny is practical, friendly, local, hands-on, and offers to teach the Courier how to survive.
